name: lacuna
description: Lacuna - a local-only FSRS-6 flashcard revision application.

scripts.electron:dev: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.preload.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='electron/dist-electron/preload.js';const dst='electron/dist-electron/preload.cjs';if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.unlinkSync(dst);fs.renameSync(src,dst);}" && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.preload.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='electron/dist-electron/preload.js';const dst='electron/dist-electron/preload.cjs';if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.unlinkSync(dst);fs.renameSync(src,dst);}" && vite build --mode production --base ./ && electron-builder --config electron/electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:win: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.preload.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='electron/dist-electron/preload.js';const dst='electron/dist-electron/preload.cjs';if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.unlinkSync(dst);fs.renameSync(src,dst);}" && vite build --mode production --base ./ && electron-builder --win --config electron/electron-builder.yml
